# DC Emergency Lock & Door

Website: https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/
Phone: 703-244-0559

DC Emergency Lock & Door provides commercial door, lock and hardware service. Washington DC is the primary service area, followed by nearby Northern Virginia and nearby Maryland. Exact service availability is confirmed by location and requested work.

No license, insurance, response-time, service-hours, rating, customer, case-study, brand, written-estimate, COI, W-9, invoicing, or certification claim should be inferred from this file. Those items remain unpublished until verified by the business.

## Primary commercial services

- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/commercial-door-repair-washington-dc — urgent commercial doors that will not close, latch, or secure
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/commercial-locksmith-washington-dc — business lockouts, commercial locks, rekeys, cylinders, and key-control planning
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/panic-bar-repair-washington-dc — diagnosis and repair of existing panic or push-bar failures
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/panic-bar-installation-washington-dc — scheduled panic and exit-hardware installation assessment
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/door-closer-repair-washington-dc — leaking, slamming, slow-closing, and non-latching door closers
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/exit-device-repair-washington-dc — failed rim, mortise, and vertical-rod exit devices
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/commercial-door-lock-repair-washington-dc — failed locks, latches, cylinders, strikes, and alignment
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/commercial-rekey-washington-dc — planned commercial key-access changes
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/fire-door-inspection-washington-dc — scheduled commercial fire-door inspection requests
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/fire-door-repair-washington-dc — known fire-door closing, latching, or hardware deficiencies
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/commercial-door-installation-washington-dc — commercial door, frame, and hardware installation planning
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/access-control-systems-washington-dc — door-side access-control hardware and integrator coordination
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/storefront-door-repair-washington-dc — commercial storefront door and hardware problems
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/master-key-systems — commercial master-key planning
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/service-restricted-key-systems — restricted-key-system planning
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/service-office-lockout — office and business lockouts
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/service-property-manager-locksmith — planned requests for property and facility teams

## Service-area hubs

- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/washington-dc
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/northern-virginia
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/maryland

## Resources and policies

- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/blog — commercial door and lock articles
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/gallery — existing commercial hardware reference photos; not presented as location-verified case studies
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/about
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/privacy-policy
- https://dcemergencylockanddoor.com/terms-of-service

General fire-door, egress, accessibility, and standards information on this website is educational. Applicable requirements and accepted editions must be confirmed for the property with the authority having jurisdiction and qualified project professionals.
